input: We deploy an AI system that assists asylum officers in evaluating asylum applications by scoring credibility of applicant statements against country-of-origin information.

expected.notes: Annex III paragraph 7(b) — examining applications for asylum, visa or residence permits, plus paragraph 7(c) — assessing reliability of evidence in the context of asylum / migration. Lexicon hit: 'asylum application'. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 7(b) and (c).
